headline: SpaceX just filed for what could be the biggest IPO ever
summary: SpaceX officially filed its S-1 prospectus with the SEC. This move could launch the largest ever IPO on Nasdaq. The company reported $18.67 billion in revenue for 2025.

headline: ‘Solve all diseases,’ you say?
summary: This special edition of The Verge's Optimizer newsletter covers Google I/O. Senior reviewer Victoria Song discusses new gadgets and 'potions' claiming life-changing impacts. Expect insights into AI health advancements like Gemini for science.

headline: Here are 42 of our favorite deals from REI’s massive Anniversary Sale
summary: REI's annual Anniversary Sale, their biggest of the year, has begun. Find huge discounts on essential outdoor gear. It's the perfect time to prep for camping trips or summer adventures.

headline: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
summary: A review compares various Nintendo Switch 2 controllers. The official $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller stands out. It's praised for its wireless connectivity, headphone jack, and superior feel.

headline: The Powerful MSI Vector 16" RTX 5070 Ti Gaming Laptop Drops to $1399 for Memorial Day
summary: The MSI Vector 16" RTX 5070 Ti Gaming Laptop is now $1399. This Memorial Day deal offers Black Friday-level pricing. It's a strong discount on a powerful gaming machine.

headline: Brandon Sanderson Says He'll Start Working on His Mistborn Era 3 Book Again in July
summary: Author Brandon Sanderson will resume writing his Mistborn Era 3 book in July. The new installment, 'Ghostbloods', is set for a December 2028 release. Fans can look forward to progress on the highly anticipated series.

headline: Save an Extra $400 Off the Compact 18-Liter Cooler Master NR2 RTX 5070 Miniature Gaming PC
summary: Get an additional $400 off the Cooler Master NR2 RTX 5070 Gaming PC. This compact 18-liter rig offers powerful performance. The deal also includes the upcoming '007 First Light' game.

headline: Walmart Still Has the Lowest Price on an Nvidia GeForce RTX 5070 12GB Graphics Card in 2026
summary: Walmart currently offers the lowest price for the Nvidia GeForce RTX 5070 12GB graphics card. Amazon has a slightly higher price but bundles '007 First Light'. Gamers should compare deals for the best value.

headline: Russian jets 'dangerously' intercept RAF spy plane over Black Sea
summary: Russian jets dangerously intercepted an unarmed RAF Rivet Joint aircraft. The British spy plane was conducting a routine international flight. The UK Ministry of Defence confirmed the incidents over the Black Sea.

headline: Women who died in sea off Brighton were sisters
summary: Three women tragically died after getting into difficulty off Brighton. Authorities confirmed the victims were sisters. Their father expressed immeasurable grief over the devastating loss.

headline: Why illegal children's homes are being paid up to £2m per child by councils
summary: Councils are reportedly paying up to £2m per child for placements in illegal homes. A ban was intended to end this practice. Concerns grow over continued funding for unregulated children's homes.

headline: Southampton lose appeal against play-off expulsion
summary: Southampton's appeal against their Championship play-off final expulsion has failed. The club was expelled for alleged spying. This means Southampton will not compete in the play-off final.
